# Plan Refinement

When creating plans in plan mode:

1. Review every plan for gaps, ambiguities, edge cases, and missed alternatives
2. Ask clarifying questions in a single grouped batch — don't drip-feed them
3. Only finalize after the user answers all questions
4. Don't over-iterate on simple plans — use proportional effort
5. If ticket context is available, align plan steps with acceptance criteria
